criticalFindings.title: Data Quality Crisis - Missing Scores
criticalFindings.impact: Cannot properly prioritize organizations or quantify urgency levels
actions: Immediately contact all 12 organizations to collect missing score data
Implement validation rules in form to prevent future submissions without scores
Establish deadline for score submission (suggest within 48 hours)
